# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type FeatureFlags = Record<string, boolean>;

const DEFAULTS = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
};

const KEY_API = 'API_KEY';
const KEY_DB = 'DB_URL';
const KEY_FLAGS = 'FEATURE_FLAGS';

function asString(value: unknown): string | undefined {
  if (typeof value === 'string') return value;
  if (value == null) return undefined;
  return String(value);
}

function asFlags(value: unknown): FeatureFlags | undefined {
  if (!value || typeof value !== 'object') return undefined;
  const obj = value as Record<string, unknown>;
  const flags: FeatureFlags = {};
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(obj)) {
    if (typeof v === 'boolean') flags[k] = v;
    else if (typeof v === 'string') {
      const s = v.trim().toLowerCase();
      if (s === 'true') flags[k] = true;
      else if (s === 'false') flags[k] = false;
    }
  }
  return Object.keys(flags).length ? flags : undefined;
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const edgeConfigId = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  let apiKey = DEFAULTS.API_KEY;
  let dbUrl = DEFAULTS.DB_URL;
  let featureFlags: FeatureFlags = {};

  if (edgeConfigId) {
    try {
      const [apiFromConfig, dbFromConfig, flagsFromConfig] = await Promise.all([
        get(KEY_API),
        get(KEY_DB),
        get(KEY_FLAGS),
      ]);

      apiKey = asString(apiFromConfig) ?? apiKey;
      dbUrl = asString(dbFromConfig) ?? dbUrl;
      featureFlags = asFlags(flagsFromConfig) ?? featureFlags;
    } catch {
      // fall back to defaults
    }
  }

  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (url.pathname === '/health') {
    return new Response('ok', {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'content-type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
      },
    });
  }

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify(
      {
        edgeConfigPresent: Boolean(edgeConfigId),
        apiKey,
        dbUrl,
        featureFlags,
      },
      null,
      2
    ),
    {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
        'cache-control': 'no-store',
      },
    }
  );
}
